retrieved_rules.reasoning: The transaction involves the provision of software development services to an overseas related party, which falls under cross-border services. Revenue recognition requires that control has transferred.

evidence_requests: Documentation showing the transfer of control over the software development services provided.
narrative_template: {{engine:contract_reference}} involves the provision of {{engine:service_type}} services to an overseas related party. The amount {{engine:amount}} is subject to revenue recognition based on the transfer of control.
